product_graph:
name: Mock Plastic Broom — 1 unit
goal: >
  Demonstrate a foreground product that uses two processes from the bundled
  tiny mock background database. All inventory values are fictional.

functional_unit:
  description: 1 mock plastic broom
  amount: 1.0
  unit: unit

products:
  - { name: Mock plastic broom, unit: unit }

processes:
  - name: Mock plastic broom assembly
    reference_output: { flow: Mock plastic broom, amount: 1.0, unit: unit }
    inputs:
      - { flow: "Mock polypropylene granulate, at plant", location: MOCK, database: mock_background, amount: 0.52, unit: kilogram }
      - { flow: "Mock freight transport, small truck", location: MOCK, database: mock_background, amount: 0.1055, unit: ton kilometer }

reference_process: Mock plastic broom assembly

lcia:
  method_name: "EF v3.1"
